title: Sweet Savory American Chicken Skillet
description: A weeknight American dish featuring chicken, Dutch stroop, and a hint of wine, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Dutch stroop and red wine.
Pour the stroop and wine mixture over the chicken and vegetables in the skillet.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the skillet to the broiler and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
